prestazioni: Engine swap to a **QR25DE** (2.5L I4, 175hp stock) with a **JE Pistons 87.5mm forged piston kit** (11.5:1 compression) and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** for high-RPM durability, paired with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial MV-R 38mm wastegate** for 22psi peak boost on E85.

**Nissan Motorsports (Nismo) camshafts** (264°/256° duration, 11.0mm/10.5mm lift) with **Brian Crower valve springs/retainers** and **Supertech titanium valves** (1mm oversized intake, 1mm oversized exhaust) for 8,500 RPM powerband, tuned via **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with flex-fuel sensor and **ID1000x injectors**.

**Nismo 4.1 final drive ratio** in the **RS5F51A 5-speed transmission** with **PPG close-ratio gears (2.345 1st, 1.655 2nd, 1.235 3rd)** and **OS Giken Super Lock LSD**, paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily** and **Nissan Motorsports lightweight flywheel** for rapid gear changes.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Sentra SE-R widebody kit** (2.5-inch fender flares, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing) with **Function7 rear diffuser** and **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (50% weight reduction over stock).

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 17x9 +35 wheels (225/40/17 Federal 595 RS-RR tires) with **BC Racing BR coilovers** (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear springs) and **Cusco front strut bar** for chassis rigidity, paired with **Nismo 4-piston front brake calipers** and **DBA 5000 Series rotors**.

**Custom interior roll cage** (8-point chromoly, **Custom Cages UK** design) with **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and **Takata Drift III harnesses**, wrapped in **Nismo red/black suede upholstery** with **Defi BF gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a **JDM-style A-pillar pod**.
